videoSnippet.title: The Master of Prague! || Nodirbek Abdusattorov vs Hans Niemann || Prague Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator 
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/
https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2751) - Niemann, Hans Moke (2725)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.03.06
B90 Sicilian, Najdorf, Byrne (English) attack

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 a6 6.Be3 e5 7.Nf3 Be7 8.Bc4 O-O 9.O-O Be6 10.Bb3 b5 11.Qd3 Qc8 12.Nh4 Nbd7 13.Nf5 Bxf5 14.exf5 Nc5 15.Bxc5 dxc5 16.Nd5 Ra7 17.c3 c4 18.Nxf6+ Bxf6 19.Qe3 Re7 20.Bc2 e4 21.Bxe4 Rfe8 22.f3 Qxf5 23.Bxf5 Rxe3 24.Be4 Re2 25.Rf2 Rxf2 26.Kxf2 b4 27.Rd1 bxc3 28.bxc3 Kf8 29.Bd5 Rd8 30.Ke2 Re8+ 31.Kf1 Rd8 32.Ke2 Re8+ 33.Kf1 Rd8 34.Ke2
